idea-plugin.name: Liva Language
idea-plugin.description:
Native JetBrains IDE support for the Liva programming language.
  • File type recognition for .liva
  • Lexer-based syntax highlighting (keywords, strings, numbers, comments, lifetimes, doc comments, string interpolation)
  • Color settings page — every token category is customizable
  • Line (//) and block (/* */) commenter
  • Brace, bracket, and parenthesis matching
  • LSP client via livac lsp — completion, hover, go-to-definition, find references, rename, code actions, diagnostics, inlay hints, call hierarchy
Requires livac on PATH (or set the path in Settings → Languages & Frameworks → Liva).
